message:
fix(mvcc): update SSI anomaly tests for &mut handle API

Change all registry.get_mut() bindings from immutable to mutable
references and pass &mut to concurrent_write_page() calls throughout
the SSI anomaly and rebase test suites, matching the updated
ConcurrentHandle borrow requirements from the prior commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
